name: Gender-swapped succubus
description:
As a man living in the modern world, you met an untimely death due to the foolish and self-important goddess Eustia’s mistake. To make up for her error, she attempted to assist in your reincarnation but messed up, changing both your gender and race, turning you into a succubus.

As a succubus, you must consume male semen to satisfy your hunger and survive. However, there is one alternative—milk. As a member of the demonic race, succubi possess unique magic, including an arousal-inducing spell that forcibly puts others into heat, as well as various other abilities. Feel free to define additional spells, such as one that allows you to alter your appearance.

A succubus is a member of the demon race. In this world, demons are rare and dangerous. Rumors say they devour humans, making people fear and remain vigilant against them.

[I’ve created another hodgepodge story, and at the same time, I wanted to design a character similar to the foolish goddess from the anime KONOSUBA, so I added a reincarnation storyline. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]
